name: spo-recycle-bin-capacity-and-retention-report
title: SharePoint Online Recycle Bin Capacity and Retention Report (All Sites)
shortDescription: Generates a tenant-wide report of first and second stage recycle bin usage, retention windows, and upcoming purge dates across SharePoint Online site collections.
longDescription: Uses PnP PowerShell with app-only authentication to enumerate SharePoint Online sites, analyze first and second stage recycle bin content, calculate storage usage, determine time-to-purge, and export detailed and summary CSV reports for governance and operational monitoring.

thumbnails.alt: Preview of the sample SharePoint Online Recycle Bin Capacity and Retention Report (All Sites)

references.name: Want to learn more about PnP PowerShell and the cmdlets
references.description: Check out the PnP PowerShell site to get started and for the reference to the cmdlets.
